form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 5th of 12 at this track on March 29 over 1700m, on rain affected going; 4.5 len behind Morindoo carrying 68kg at $16.50. Previously second-up 6th of 10 at Cologne on September 28 over 1850m, 6 len behind Nordwalde with 58.5kg at $18.20. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 4th of 12 at this track on March 29 over 2100m, on a wet track; 2 len behind Oriental King carrying 62kg at $8.70. Previously second-up 9th of 16 at Compiegne on April 25 over 2000m, slow going 12 len behind Speed For Fun with 56.5kg at $144. Sure to run well.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last in a small field at Dresden December 7 over 1500m, soft track; 27 len behind Asker with 60kg at $7.30. On debut won by 0.8 len Bad Harzburg July 24 over 1550m defeating Dirty Deeds with 58kg at $2.80. Hard to recommend.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 46-day let-up. First-up after four months second last of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on February 25 over 1600m, 33 len behind Lord Clover with 58kg at $59. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Dortmund on June 22 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Perito carrying 58kg at $3.80. One of the top chances.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last campaign 10th of 12 at Deauville All Weather on December 28 2024 over 2500m, 13 len behind Black Hawk carrying 56kg at $58. When resuming last campaign 7th of 15 at Chantilly All Weather on February 29 2024 over 1900m, 2.5 len behind Big Raj with 56.5kg at $105. This looks a stern test.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of five-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign ninth of 14 at Southwell All Weather October 24 over 2414m, 8 len behind Hickton carrying 57.5kg at $7. When resuming last campaign eighth of 10 at Ascot May 9 over 2011m, 6 len behind Wonder Star with 58kg at $67. Excellent chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Krefeld November 15 over 2200m, 12 len behind Dortmunder with 56kg at $15.90. On debut 12th of 15 at Hannover August 24 over 1750m, 33 len behind Keep Smiling with 56kg at $56.60. Certainly one to consider.
